final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original illustration of a road trip scene on Route 66 with a red convertible car (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 复古美式 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the red convertible centered on the road, desert stretching to both sides, sky dominant in upper frame
Subject: must include a red convertible car driving on 66号公路, flanked by desert terrain and cacti
Scene/backdrop: must include 66号公路 as the road, arid desert landscape on both sides, cacti scattered throughout
Lighting/mood: needs a 夕阳 atmosphere with a sense of 自由奔放 — exact light source mix and emotional tone are yours
Color palette: needs an orange-red sunset direction dominating the sky — exact hues and gradients are yours
Materials/textures: needs a vintage illustration surface treatment — exact grain / print texture is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
